reference: Hi. My girlfriend and I had unprotected sex three days ago. That night, she had a running nose, a fever, and a sore throat. I went to see her the next day, and she was having a whitish liquid coming from inside her vagina. Is there any chance that she is pregnant?
text: Hi. My girlfriend and I had unprotected sex days ago. That night, she had a running nose, a fever, and a sore throat. I went to see her the next day, and she was having a whitish liquid coming from inside her vagina. Is there any chance that she is pregnant?
